content.content: Became known as an on-air studio anchor with Dirty Water Media in 2016. She went on to run the widely popular podcastCall Her Daddy. She grew up in Newtown, Pennsylvania and attended Pennington High School. She was a soccer star atBoston University, where she won a Patriot League title in 2014. Also an Instagram model, her selfies and travel photos have earned her more than 3.2 million followers to date. She has a sister named Kathryn and a brother named Grant. In March 2023, she got engaged to Matt Kaplan. She co-hosted Call Her Daddy alongsideSofia Franklynat the start before taking over hosting duties on her own.  She's had several TikTok stars as guests on her Podact includingMads Lewis.
